about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Ease Travel Tourism Company
about.description: Ease Travel is an Egyptian tourism company specialized in providing comprehensive tourism services including Hajj & Umrah trips, inbound and outbound tourism. We always strive to provide the best services at competitive prices while ensuring the highest levels of quality and comfort for our customers.
about.missionText: To deliver an unforgettable travel experience for every customer, with attention to the finest details to ensure a comfortable and enjoyable trip.
about.visionText: To be the leading tourism company in Egypt, contributing to the promotion of Egyptian tourism at the regional and international levels.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you anytime
contact.name: Name

tours.title: All Tours
tours.subtitle: Discover Egypt & Beyond
tours.introText: Browse our curated collection of guided tour packages, private tours, and group adventures across Egypt and international destinations. Whether you're looking for a guided tour of the Pyramids, a private tour along the Nile, or an adventure-filled day trip from Hurghada — every itinerary is crafted by local travel experts to give you an authentic, hassle-free experience.
tours.whyItem1: Expert-led guided tours with licensed local guides
tours.whyItem2: Flexible private tours tailored to your schedule
tours.whyItem3: Small group tours for a more personal experience
tours.whyItem4: Best price guarantee on all tour packages
tours.browseCta: Browse tours below or contact us for a custom private tour designed just for you.
